name: Dokunemon

signature_move.name: Worm Venom
signature_move.description: Jumps and scatters a neurotoxinfrom its beak that paralyzes the enemy

description: A Larva Digimon whose appearance is very similar to Kunemon . Like Kunemon, it is being studied in order to solve the mystery of Insect Digimon, but unlike Kunemon, it has a timid personality, and because it usually lives hidden in forests, it is difficult to find, and so research has not progressed. In addition, it carries a very potent toxin, and it is dangerous to even touch it. Its Special Moves are jumping and scattering a neurotoxin from its beak that paralyzes the enemy ( Worm Venom ), and charging and then stabbing the enemy with the horn on its tail ( Poison Ride ).
